programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Now We Know!
programme.desc: WBC Productions alongside Steve Guttenberg present Now We Know! Inspiring and educating audiences - featuring HART, Marcone, Apple Bank and Champro.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: Epic Platinum Rarity
programme.desc: Get the first and only American coin honoring the Declaration of Independence today! This specially minted 2026 Platinum Eagle graded PF70UCAM celebrates 250 years of America with a design featuring the quill used by the Founding Fathers in 1776!

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Learn More About Medicare Advantage Plans from Humana
programme.desc: Learn about the variety of Humana Medicare plans designed to fit people's needs, lifestyle, and budget.

programme.title: The Fencing Show
programme.desc: Each episode brings viewers the best of Olympic, Paralympic, and youth competition, plus inspiring athlete stories and expert commentary that reveal the strategy, speed, and drama of this fast-paced sport.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A con man runs a fake green energy business and collects millions by scamming major corporations; a notorious cat burglar steals sterling silver in America's most expensive ZIP codes.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A neighborhood ice cream parlor in West Roxbury, Mass., lands the Palladino family in a major case of fraud.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: The Broadway premiere of "Rebecca" implodes thanks to New York stockbroker Mark Hotton, who allegedly swindles millions of dollars from investors.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A fraudster in California promises to build a medical glove factory in the U.S. and steals millions of dollars from investors.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Darren Berg of Seattle, scams several investors, procuring himself two yachts, a private jet and a lakeside mansion; New York socialite Dina Wein Reis executes a gray market selling scam.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: James Henrikson schemes to strike it rich in the North Dakota oil fields, and he lets no one get in his way; when they do, they die.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Zachary Horwitz has dreams of making it big in Hollywood; while his onscreen career never quite flourishes, Horwitz acts his way into raising more than $600 million for an investment opportunity that is completely bogus.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: How multibillion-dollar company Pacific Gas & Electric comes to repeatedly kill its customers by putting profits over safety as alleged by critics.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Personal injury attorney Tom Girardi posits himself as a champion for the little guy, but jilted clients cry foul when they discover him cheating them out of millions in settlement money as his wife flaunts her wealth on reality television.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A neighborhood ice cream parlor in West Roxbury, Mass., lands the Palladino family in a major case of fraud.
